# NOVARO

NOVARO is a premium fashion e-commerce brand with a sleek, international identity inspired by leading fashion retailers like Zara, Bershka, and Terminal X. The brand exudes modern sophistication through a minimalist black, white, and gray aesthetic. It operates as a bilingual (Hebrew RTL and English) online store offering men's and women's clothing, with a full shopping experience including product galleries, size and color selection, cart management, and a custom checkout flow that generates unique order numbers and sends WhatsApp order confirmations. Payment is handled via Israeli platforms Bit and PayBox, with dedicated customer support contacts.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Elevate Your Wardrobe with Premium Men&#39;s Clothing Stores — NOVARO

URL: https://example.com
Description: Discover NOVARO&#39;s minimalist fashion for men &amp; women. Shop curated collections inspired by global trends, from tommy hilfiger clothing to streetwear. Start styling now.

Design Philosophy

## Refined Wardrobe Essentials


NOVARO translates international runway energy into wearable everyday collections. Every silhouette is shaped by a commitment to clean lines, precise tailoring, and a monochromatic palette that refuses to shout — because true style speaks in whispers.

















### Premium Seasonal Curation


Every piece is hand-selected from forward-thinking ateliers, ensuring your wardrobe stays ahead of the trend cycle with considered, limited-run drops.









### Tailored Fit Confidence


Precision sizing guides and detailed garment specs remove the guesswork, so every order lands with the exact drape and silhouette you envisioned.









### Clean International Styling


Architectural cuts, neutral tones, and uncluttered detailing define a universal aesthetic that moves effortlessly from Tel Aviv to Berlin to Tokyo.















NOVARO / SS24

## The Season of Sharp Statements


Discover the latest curated collections — where minimalism meets bold intention.

Architectural silhouettes and fluid tailoring that redefine modern femininity.

### Fresh Arrivals


Just landed: the season's most anticipated pieces. From reimagined classics to bold new silhouettes.

Sale

### The Archive


Curated past-season pieces at exceptional value. Timeless style never fades.

Shop Sale  →















Testimonials

## Crafting Tomorrow&#39;s Fashion Identity Today — NOVARO

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Behind NOVARO&#39;s sleek monochrome aesthetic lies a passion for modern design. Learn how we curate premium men&#39;s clothing stores essentials with an international edge.

Crafting Tomorrow's Fashion Identity Today — NOVARO













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- About Us
- New Arrivals
- Sale
- Journal
- Contact
0


















Our Story

# The Art of Modern Silhouette


NOVARO was born at the intersection of Tel Aviv's raw energy and Milan's refined tailoring. We believe that premium fashion should feel both immediate and enduring — a wardrobe of clean lines, confident volumes, and meticulous detail. Every piece we design is a study in proportion, crafted for those who dress with intention.


Rooted in a bilingual international identity, our collections speak Hebrew and English fluently, reflecting a global generation that moves between cultures. From our atelier to your closet, NOVARO delivers silhouettes that transcend seasons — sharp blazers, fluid trousers, and the kind of oversized knits that define modern street style.




Premium Materials



Digital-First Experience



Timeless Silhouettes
























Our Story

## The NOVARO Vision


Born from the energy of international fashion capitals, crafted with a commitment to premium materials, and designed for the modern individual. NOVARO bridges the gap between runway inspiration and everyday wear, offering a balanced collection for both men and women through a seamless digital experience.









01




### Inspired by Global Capitals


From the minimalist ateliers of Paris to the electric street style of Tokyo, NOVARO draws its creative direction from the world's most influential fashion hubs. Every collection is a curated edit of global trends, distilled into pieces that feel both aspirational and accessible. We translate the pulse of the runway into a wardrobe that moves with you, wherever you are.







02




### Premium Material Direction


We believe that true luxury lies in the touch and longevity of a garment. Our design philosophy centers on sourcing superior fabrics—from heavyweight organic cottons to responsibly sourced wools and innovative blends. Each piece is rigorously tested for fit, drape, and durability, ensuring that NOVARO clothing not only looks exceptional but feels extraordinary against the skin, season after season.







03




### Balanced Men's & Women's Offering


NOVARO rejects the notion of gendered fashion silos. Our collections are developed in parallel, with a shared aesthetic language that champions sharp tailoring, fluid silhouettes, and a monochromatic palette. Whether you're exploring our men's clothing stores section or browsing the latest women's arrivals, you'll find a cohesive identity built on confidence, versatility, and understated elegance.







04




### Customer-First Digital Retail


At the heart of NOVARO is a relentless focus on the customer journey. Our platform is engineered for clarity and speed—from intuitive size and color selection to a transparent checkout flow with instant WhatsApp order confirmations. We combine the tactile excitement of discovering new fashion with the convenience of modern digital retail, ensuring every interaction with NOVARO feels personal, premium, and effortless.
















Our Philosophy

## The Values That Define NOVARO


Built on a foundation of uncompromising quality, radical clarity, and inclusive confidence. Every piece we create is a statement of intent, designed for those who move through the world with purpose.




01 · Quality

### Uncompromising Craftsmanship


From fabric selection to final stitch, we hold every garment to an exacting standard. Our pieces are engineered to endure, blending luxury materials with meticulous construction for a feel that lasts beyond the season.




02 · Clarity

### Radical Transparency


We believe in honest fashion. Clear pricing, detailed product information, and straightforward communication define every interaction. No hidden costs, no confusing policies—just a seamless experience from discovery to delivery.




03 · Confidence

### Empowered Self-Expression


Clothing is armor for the modern world. Our designs are cut to empower, with silhouettes that command attention and details that reward a second look. Wear NOVARO and step into your most confident self.




04 · Inclusivity

### Fashion Without Boundaries


Style knows no gender, size, or background. Our collections are thoughtfully designed for every body and every story, ensuring that premium fashion is accessible, comfortable, and flattering for all.













The Collective

## Meet the vision behind NOVARO


Our leadership team blends decades of fashion expertise with a sharp digital-first mindset. From creative direction to customer experience, every detail is curated to deliver the premium style and service that define NOVARO.





Products















### Dana Alrov


Founder & CEO


With over fifteen years in international fashion buying, Dana launched NOVARO to bridge runway aesthetics with accessible everyday wear. She shapes the brand's vision and leads strategic growth across men's and women's collections.











### Eli Barak


Creative Director


Eli shapes the NOVARO aesthetic — from editorial campaigns to the site's visual language. His background in luxury branding ensures every touchpoint feels refined, modern, and unmistakably NOVARO.











### Maya Chen


Head of Customer Experience


Maya ensures every NOVARO interaction — from browsing to unboxing — exceeds expectations. She built the support and fulfillment systems that keep our community coming back.














Redefining modern elegance through curated fashion collections that celebrate individuality and timeless design.

THIS SEASON

## Elevated Essentials & Bold Statements


Discover the latest drops that define the modern wardrobe. From reimagined tailoring to effortless streetwear, our new arrivals are curated for those who lead, not follow.












### The Outerwear Update


Architectural silhouettes and luxurious wool blends. Our new season coats bring structure and warmth to every look.

Explore Outerwear  →










### Monochrome Tailoring


Precision-cut blazers and fluid trousers in head-to-toe black. The new power dressing, redefined.

Shop Tailoring  →










### Elevated Casualwear


Luxurious knits and perfectly cut denim. Everyday pieces finished with an impeccable attention to detail.

View Casual  →










### Occasion Edits


Standout pieces for every after-dark moment. Satin, sequins, and sculptural forms designed to turn heads.

Discover Dresses  →















WHY SHOP THE DROP

## Reasons to shop the newest drop


Trend relevance, premium fit, and versatile styling from day to evening — curated for the modern wardrobe.











### Trend Relevance


Each piece is selected to reflect the latest runway movements, ensuring your wardrobe stays ahead of the curve with contemporary silhouettes and fresh detailing.









### Premium Fit


Precision tailoring and high-grade fabrics define our collection. Every garment is engineered for comfort and a flawless silhouette that moves with you.









### Day to Evening


Versatile styling that transitions effortlessly. From morning meetings to evening events, our pieces adapt to your lifestyle with understated elegance.



















THE EDIT

## New Arrivals


Visual styling inspiration for the season, pairing textures, silhouettes, and tonal layering ideas. Discover the latest pieces that define modern sophistication.

Curated Reductions





## The Art of the Edit

Explore the Sale













Up to 40% Off

















Seasonal Edit

## Curated Reductions


Limited-time highlights, last-chance essentials, wardrobe staples, and occasionwear — each selected to refine your seasonal rotation with premium pieces at exceptional value.











### Flash Highlights


Time-sensitive drops refreshed weekly. The season's most directional pieces, available at exceptional prices for a limited window.


Up to 50% off
Explore →









### Last Chance


Final quantities of our most-loved silhouettes. Once they're gone, they're gone — secure your favourites before the collection closes.


Final stock
Shop now →









### Wardrobe Staples


The foundation pieces that define every look — premium knitwear, tailored trousers, and crisp shirting at considered reductions.


30–40% off
Browse →









### Occasionwear


Evening dresses, structured blazers, and statement accessories — everything you need for the moments that matter, now at remarkable prices.


New markdowns
Discover →














SUPPORT

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about shopping the NOVARO sale.





01

### How long will sale items be available?




Our seasonal sale runs while stocks last. Once an item sells out, it is typically not restocked at the discounted price. We recommend checking back regularly as new markdowns are added throughout the sale period.





02

### What is your exchange and return policy for sale items?




Sale items can be exchanged within 14 days of delivery. Returns for monetary refund are not available on sale products — instead, we offer store credit valid for 12 months. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and have all original tags attached.





03

### Are sale items the same quality as full-price pieces?




Absolutely. Every NOVARO piece — whether full-price or marked down — meets the same rigorous quality standards. Sale pricing reflects seasonal rotation, not defects. Each garment is inspected before shipping to ensure it arrives in perfect condition.





04

### How can I reach customer support?




Our support team is available via WhatsApp at 054-891-9881 or by email at . We respond to all inquiries within a few hours during business days. For order-related questions, please have your order number ready.





05

### When does the next sale drop start?




We announce new sale drops exclusively through our newsletter and Instagram channel. Sign up at the bottom of the page to receive early access notifications. Major seasonal sales typically launch at the end of winter and summer collections.















Customer Care

## We're here to help


Need assistance with your sale selections, sizing questions, or have a general support request? Our team at NOVARO is dedicated to providing you with a seamless shopping experience. Reach out and we'll respond promptly.





Customer Support: 0548919881



Transfer Number: 0544300878

NOVARO / SS24






# Let's Talk


### Encourage direct communication for styling guidance, order support, payment assistance, and general brand inquiries.


Get In Touch




















### Customer Support


Need help with your order? Our team is here to assist you with sizing, shipping, or any questions you may have.

054-891-9881








### Payment Transfer


Complete your payment via Bit or PayBox. Use the transfer number below for a seamless checkout experience.

054-430-0878








### Availability & Response


We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, call or message us directly on WhatsApp.

Chat on WhatsApp













Get in Touch

## Contact NOVARO


Have a question about sizing, shipping, or your order? Our support team is here to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.






### Customer Support


We're available Sunday through Thursday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST. For immediate assistance, you can also reach us via WhatsApp.

Support

## We're here to help you


At NOVARO, every detail matters. Our support team is dedicated to ensuring your experience is seamless, from sizing guidance to order follow-up. Reach out anytime — we speak your language.

Contact Support





- ### Sizing Guidance Find your perfect fit with our detailed size charts and personalized recommendations.

- ### Payment Clarification Secure payments via Bit & PayBox. Clear instructions for every transaction.

- ### Shipping Communication Track your order in real-time and receive WhatsApp updates at every step.

- ### Returns Support Hassle-free returns within 30 days. We'll guide you through the process.

- ### Order Follow-Up Need to modify or check your order? Our team is on standby to assist you.

NOVARO / SS24


















Editorial

# Style Notes &Campaign Thinking


### Introducing NOVARO editorial content. From seasonal fashion direction to the stories behind the collections, explore the vision shaping modern menswear and womenswear.


Explore the Journal

















The Journal


## Style Notes & Seasonal Edits


Curated guides from the NOVARO studio — building a smarter wardrobe, one essential at a time.











Wardrobe

### Building a Monochrome Wardrobe


Master the art of tonal dressing with premium basics that work across every season. Discover how black, white, and gray pieces create endless refined combinations.

Read Article  →









Seasonal

### Key Seasonal Layers to Invest In


From lightweight trenches to structured wool coats, these are the transitional layers that define a polished cold-weather silhouette.

Read Article  →









Styling

### Men's & Women's Looks with Premium Basics


How the right foundational pieces — a perfect shirt, a sharp blazer, a flawless knit — elevate both masculine and feminine silhouettes.

Read Article  →















NOVARO / MANIFESTO







## Confidence is not worn.It is understood.


Our perspective on silhouette, material integrity, and the art of cross-season dressing redefines what it means to build a wardrobe. Every piece is a deliberate choice, not a fleeting trend.










### Material Integrity


We source fabrics that hold structure and age with intention. From heavyweight organic cotton to precision-cut wool blends, every textile is selected for its tactile honesty and longevity.







### Silhouette Architecture


Our design language is built on proportion, not decoration. Oversized outerwear, tailored suiting, and fluid draping create a visual tension that feels both architectural and effortless.



















## Stay in the Loop


Receive launch updates, new season previews, and curated style inspiration delivered directly to your inbox.






Subscribe

Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/2/2026



At NOVARO, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/2/2026



NOVARO ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: NOVARO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice














Redefining modern elegance through curated fashion collections that celebrate individuality and timeless design.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products




- Home
- About Us
- New Arrivals
- Sale
- Journal
- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 2, 2026



NOVARO is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: NOVARO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














Redefining modern elegance through curated fashion collections that celebrate individuality and timeless design.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

































- Products Products




- Home

0















# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 2, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - NOVARO

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Fashion E-commerce provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


NOVARO provides Fashion E-commerce through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by NOVARO. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: NOVARO

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
